content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market under pressure with NIFTY -1.11%, BANKNIFTY -1.24%, REALTY -2.36%, AUTO -1.59%, PSU BANK -1.73%, and VIX +9.5% to 18.44 — clear risk-off tape. However, defensive rotation is sharp: PHARMA +0.69%, IT +0.29%, plus FMCG / Healthcare names spiking on Q4 prints. My book is correctly tilted toward these defensives (Marico, Coforge, Wockpharma, Lauruslabs, Tataconsum, Dabur) which are all flying on positive Q4 catalysts. Priority: trail SLs aggressively on the winners to lock gains, given VIX spike implies reversal risk is elevated.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF, -1% on mild profit-taking. SL 121 intact, well below CMP 123.84. Safe-haven thesis on geopolitical/INR weakness still valid. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 828 already at breakeven+ (entry 820). CMP 840.90, +2.5%. Q4 PAT +14% YoY, record high, FMCG defensive rotation. SL 828 sits 1.5% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline (>1%). Target 855 close to ATH 843, reasonable. No-op MODIFY check: stored 828/855 = proposed 828/855, so emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Replacing prior MODIFY: stored SL/target unchanged, no-op MODIFY would be wasted signal. SL 828 sits 1.5% below CMP — valid trail gap. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.20,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Big winner +10%, CMP 1384.40. Stored SL 1357.20 already at +7.8% from entry — locks in solid gain, sits 2% below CMP (good trail gap). Raising target from 1420 to 1450 since CMP already through 1420; brokerage PTs span 1430-2020. SL tightening not needed beyond stored level (already 2% below CMP per rule). Target bump only."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.1%, CMP 1443.80 vs SL 1465 — wait, CMP is BELOW stored SL 1465. Verifying: SL 1465 > CMP 1443.80, so position should have already stopped out. Engine SL will trigger; do not pre-empt via EXIT (Rule 17). Hold; if SL not fired due to intraday tick, let the order book handle it. Q4 was strong (PAT +37%, UVG 15.3%), thesis intact technically."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1618.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1618 = breakeven, CMP 1656.40 (+2.3%). SL gap = 2.3% below CMP, valid trail. Stored values unchanged → this is a no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY recanted. SL at breakeven 1618, target 1740 intact. Pharma sector at 52w high, Q4 strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2760.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored 2760/2920 unchanged from proposed. No-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5%, CMP 2790, SL 2760 (-1.1% from CMP). Q4 PAT FY26 +46.7%, specialty chem play intact. SL too tight to tighten further without breaching 1% gap rule. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored 8950/9550 unchanged. No-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. Q4 print strong, brokerage PTs 9770-10500. SL 8950 = -1.4% from entry. Hold; if SL fires, accept it."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6%, CMP 10556 vs SL 10440 (1.1% below CMP). Q4 standalone PAT +34%, buyback at 12000 = price floor, record date May 29. Auto sector weak today (-1.59%) but stock-specific catalyst strong. Hold to SL; do not pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.7%, CMP 476.95, SL 468 (-1.9% below). Q4 PAT +15.7%, neutral research sentiment but FMCG rotation supportive. SL intact; hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "new_target": 1310.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1240 already above entry 1226 (+1.1% locked). CMP 1265.80 (+3.5%). Gap = 2% below CMP, valid. Raising target from 1290 to 1310 — CMP already pushed past prior target's airspace, pharma at 52w highs, brokerage tailwinds. SL unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1198.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored 1198/1330 unchanged. -2.5% intraday wobble after gap-up reversal (high 1253 → CMP 1221), but Q4 print (PAT +21.5%, UVG 16%) intact. SL 1198 = -2% below CMP, valid. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY recanted. Hold to SL 1198."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 855.00,
      "new_target": 920.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4% CMP 864.55. Stored SL 838 (-3.1% from CMP). Raising SL to 855 — slightly below entry 865, locks downside to -1.2%. SL 855 sits 1.1% below CMP — within trail-gap rule. Q4 PAT +32%, order backlog +61% YoY, power segment +50%."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

  "watchlist_notes": "Rule 18 audit of qualifying BULLISH candidates not added: (1) MCX (+0.08 mod) — at ATH after triple-digit profit print, P/B 27.7x at 78% premium to peers, sharp +6% multi-day rally — extended, prefer pullback. (2) BIOCON (-0.03 mod, NEUTRAL) — Q4 PAT -56.8%, fails sentiment bar. (3) BERGEPAINT — Board meeting May 12 (TOMORROW, 1 session) — Rule 11 binary-event exclusion for new entry. (4) TATACONSUM, DABUR, MARICO, COFORGE, WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS, SRF, POLYCAB, CGPOWER, BAJAJ-AUTO — already held, cluster risk on adding more FMCG/Pharma. (5) HCLTECH, INFY, SUNPHARMA, TORNTPHARM, PERSISTENT, NTPC, APOLLOHOSP, DRREDDY — data not provided / DRREDDY/TORNTPHARM results May 12 (Rule 11 exclusion). (6) NIFTYBEES — broad-market ETF on a -1.1% NIFTY day with VIX +9.5% is buying the falling knife, prefer to wait for VIX to settle. Net: deployed 50%, cash 50%; defensible because (a) VIX spike + 35%+ allocation already in defensives (FMCG+Pharma+specialty chem) which are catching the rotation, (b) tomorrow brings 2-3 binary results events (BERGEPAINT, DRREDDY, TORNTPHARM), (c) book is already broadly diversified across 12 names. Will reassess admit side post-1pm if VIX cools.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is positioned correctly for the risk-off tape — heavy defensive tilt (FMCG, Pharma, Healthcare, specialty chem). 5-day stats are weak (13% win rate, 1.0x PF) but today's tape is rewarding the defensive rotation thesis with COFORGE +10%, MARICO +2.5%, LAURUSLABS +3.5%, WOCKPHARMA +2.3%, CGPOWER +0.4%. Primary risk: PIDILITIND and DABUR at -3.1%/-1.7% near their SLs. Per Rule 17, NOT pre-empting these — let SLs do their job. HFCL pending MIS BUY at 133.50 from 7584m ago (>5 days stale) — should cancel separately if engine supports, but no MODIFY-pending-order in current schema. Flagging for next tick."
}
